revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing placeholder pages to clear up the wanted pages

Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>" to "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"
Text replacement - "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>" to "[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]"
revision.text: [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Transclusionless/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Erroneous transclusions of Transclusionless/doc
Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
